sections.paragraph: βάσανος, ου, ἡ [of Oriental origin, prob. via Egypt; ‘touchstone’, freq. used to test gold for purity, then of tests of various kinds, including punitive examination, and by extension of suffering or misery from various causes] severe pain associated w. punishment torment Lk 16:23, 28; without focus on punitive aspect misery Mt 4:24.
